title: Schizoloma trilobatum
taxonomy: Schizoloma trilobatum is a species of fern, more specifically a member of the Lomariopsidaceae family within the order Polypodiales. This plant is a type of climbing or scrambling fern that is commonly found in tropical regions. The classification of Schizoloma trilobatum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum and class are both Pteridophyta and Polypodiopsida, respectively. Its classification at the family and order levels places it in the Lomariopsidaceae and Polypodiales, respectively. Further research may be necessary to fully determine the classification of this specific species.
